channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: What are Iran’s cluster munitions that are penetrating Israeli defences?
item.description: Cluster bombs disperse munitions over a wide area and are particularly dangerous for civilians, analysts say.

item.title: Qatar’s foreign affairs ministry stresses need for regional coexistence
item.description: Qatar’s foreign affairs ministry spokesman said that coexistence in the region is essential despite Iranian attacks.

item.title: Adviser questions US justification for war on Iran
item.description: Brian Finucane says US intelligence failed to substantiate claims of an ‘imminent threat’ from Iran

item.title: The US should end the war asap
item.description: The best way to manage the fallout of the US-Israel war on Iran is to end it now.

item.title: Missing Iranian uranium hinders Trump’s victory declaration
item.description: Former NATO official William Alberque says 440 kg of missing Iranian uranium is blocking a US victory claim.

item.title: ’Terrified’ Israeli residents recount Iranian missile attack
item.description: Video shows the aftermath of an Iranian missile attack on the Israeli town of Nesher.

item.title: Lebanon declares Iranian ambassador persona non grata amid Israeli attacks
item.description: Lebanese Foreign Ministry summons envoy to Iran, citing breaches of diplomatic protocol by Tehran.

item.title: Amazon says AWS Bahrain region ‘disrupted’ following drone activity
item.description: The disruption marks the second time in a month that AWS operations have been affected by the Iran war.

item.title: Iran launches waves of missiles towards Israel
item.description: Israel’s Magen David Adom emergency medical service said 'six people were lightly injured' in the missile strikes.

item.title: Iran says no talks with US, calls Trump statements a ‘bluff’
item.description: Iranian officials have dismissed statements by Trump as a ‘bluff’, denying any direct or indirect talks with the US.
